content: Hey folks, I'm new to kernel development and open source. I spotted issue #1225 which seemed scoped and achievable, so I gave it a shot. I prepared a branch while waiting for the minimum version bump. If anyone has a moment to check whether this is the right direction, feedback is very welcome. Happy to learn and address anything that needs adjusting.
Hi, thanks for putting in the effort! At a quick glance I noticed you put the link tag under the Signed-off-by tag. Signed-off-by tags usually come last.

If you haven't seen yet, there is a guideline for sending your change to the mailing list: https://rust-for-linux.com/contributing#submit-checklist-addendum

Maintainers usually don't review on GH, so if you have your patch ready and working, you can publish it to the ML for reviews
